report_name: Estée Lauder Discloses Breach of SSNs, Health, Financial Data

identities.name: The Estée Lauder Companies
identities.description: Global beauty and cosmetics company that suffered a data breach exposing sensitive customer and potentially employee data, including Social Security numbers, financial information, and protected health information (PHI).

indicators.name: Estée Lauder Lookalike Domain Monitoring
indicators.pattern:
title: Potential Estee Lauder Lookalike Domain DNS Query
id: 9c5b1a3d-e8f9-4b1c-8d6e-2f7a5b4c3d2e
status: experimental
description: Detects DNS queries to potential lookalike domains related to Estee Lauder, which could be used for post-breach phishing campaigns.
references:
  - https://www.classaction.org/data-breach-lawsuits/the-estee-lauder-companies-july-2026
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-14
tags:
  - attack.t1566.002
level: medium
logsource:
  category: dns_query
detection:
  selection:
    QueryName|contains:
      - 'esteelauder'
      - 'elcompanies'
  filter:
    QueryName|endswith:
      - '.esteelauder.com'
      - '.elcompanies.com'
      - 'esteelauder.com'
      - 'elcompanies.com'
  condition: selection and not filter
indicators.description: Detects DNS queries to potential lookalike domains of Estée Lauder brands, which could be used for post-breach phishing campaigns, based on hunting hints provided in the report.
